case_title: DIEP, JUDY et al vs. OQUENDO, ALBERTO et al

docket_entries.description: COURT CONVENS. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. JUDGMENT IS REACHED BY STIPULATION. DEFENDANT, ALBERTO OOUENDO, AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFFS, JUDY DIEP $1,639.00, NHAN NGO $1,652.00, JENNI NGO $2,226.50, AND JESSICA HO, $200.00. EACH SIDE SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS. THE PLAINTIFFS SHALL PROVIDE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE ONCE MONIES ARE PAID. A MINORS COMPROMISE IS NOT NEEDED.
